name: Fudgie Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour three 8-inch cake pans with cocoa powder.
3. In a small bowl, blend together the flour, cocoa powder, and baking soda.
4. In a large mixing bowl, cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition, then stir in vanilla extract.
6. Alternately add the dry ingredient mixture and buttermilk to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients, and beat well after each addition.
7. Pour batter into prepared cake pans.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Cool slightly in pans on wire racks.
10. Remove from pans and cool completely on wire racks.
Filling:
1 14 oz. (400 g) can Sweetened condensed milk
1 pkg. (12 oz.) Semi-sweet chocolate chips
1/2 cup Water
2 teaspoons Vanilla extract
Mix the sweetened condensed milk, chocolate chips, water, and vanilla extract in a heavy saucepan over medium-low heat until thickened.
Cool completely.
Chocolate Buttercream Frosting:
1 cup Confectioners' sugar
1/2 cup Butter or margarine, softened
3 ounces Unsweetened baking chocolate, melted and cooled
2 teaspoons Vanilla extract
4 tablespoons Half-and-half (light cream)
3 ounces White chocolate, shaved
Beat all ingredients except the white chocolate in a mixing bowl until light and creamy. Frost the cake layers with buttercream frosting and top with shaved white chocolate.
Enjoy!
